steps.name: diagram-trigger-policy
steps.summary: Added the diagram trigger policy contract: diagram jobs are scheduled only for architecture, workflow, infra, or data-flow topics, daily diagram quota prevents unbounded generation, and diagram generation failures stay retryable without hiding the published post.

steps.name: diagram-asset-storage
steps.summary: Added the post_assets contract and diagram asset storage policy: assets are bound to the current published post version, require alt text and public-safe /blog-assets/ paths, reject private hosts or credential-like text, and keep replacement/deletion audit records.
